input: Hey, I upgraded to pro 2 weeks ago and the dashboard still shows free tier limits. I can't do my work. I've submitted 3 tickets and nobody has responded. What's going on?
response: Hey, so sorry about this! Your pro account will be activated within a couple hours — we've escalated it now. We'll also close out those open tickets and add some credit to your account for the trouble. Thanks for sticking with us!
